content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 Beta / test language WARN — release_notes.txt calls the app a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), while description.txt has no such language.

Pierre: Apple reviewers read release notes as store-facing copy, and language like "public beta" or "expect rough edges" signals an unfinished build, which can trigger a 2.2 rejection even if the binary itself is stable. Please rewrite the release notes to describe the sync feature confidently as a finished feature (e.g., "New: sync your tasks across devices") without beta/testing disclaimers. Verify no other locale's release notes carry similar language before resubmitting.
